subject: ARM: OMAP2+: pm33xx-core: ix device node reference leaks in amx3_idle_init
notes: POC generated independently for rep2 (no reuse of rep1 POC).
Verifier needed a slice-of-_buggy (poc-for-verifier.c) to align counts with seed-slice; this is the same setup rep1 used.
Initial query had a select-clause if-then-else expression syntax error; fixed in 1 repair iter by factoring into helper predicate exitKind/1.
Query is generic: matches any device_node-acquiring API (of_parse_phandle, of_find_*, of_get_*) and any continue/break exit lacking of_node_put on the variable.
POC sha256 frozen after verifier pass; recorded in experiments/rq3/poc-sha.json.
